name: cold_morning_warm_day_no_breach
description: Cold night (62F) into a warm day (72F peak) that stays within the comfort band. Heat fires at 6 AM to close the comfort-floor gap, then classification sets HVAC off once indoor reaches comfort_heat. Windows open when outdoor drops below indoor in the evening.
notes: Covers the Heat→Off→NatVent transition pattern not covered by existing golden scenarios.
The warm-day comfort-floor guard ensures heat runs until indoor >= comfort_heat before HVAC goes off.
No ceiling breach occurs — indoor never exceeds comfort_cool=74F — so the ODE ceiling guard is dormant all day.
This is a gap-filling scenario: warm-day classification does NOT mean instant shutoff when indoor is below the comfort floor.

events.note: Cold night — indoor 65F is well below comfort_heat=70F; outdoor 52F
Warm-day classification: hvac_mode=off. But indoor=65F < comfort_heat=70F — comfort-floor guard fires heat instead.
Heat has warmed indoor to 70.5F, above comfort_heat=70F. HVAC off now appropriate.
30-min classification re-evaluation: indoor=70.5F >= comfort_heat=70F — HVAC off applied normally.
Evening: indoor 72F, outdoor 65F (outdoor < indoor). Windows eligible for nat vent.
User opens window — outdoor 65F < indoor 72F, indoor > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor < threshold 77F.

assertions.reason: Warm-day classification stored. Simulator applies classification_applied. In production, the comfort-floor guard in apply_classification() would fire heat because indoor=65F < comfort_heat=70F; the simulator mirrors the classification outcome at this layer.
Second classification cycle: indoor=70.5F >= comfort_heat=70F — comfort floor satisfied, HVAC off applied as the warm-day classification directs.
Evening sensor_open: outdoor=65F < indoor=72F, indoor=72F > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor=65F <= threshold 74+3=77F — nat vent activates.

verdict.summary: Cold-morning warm-day cycle stays within comfort band; nat-vent activates in evening when outdoor drops below indoor
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied at 6 AM (guard not modeled in simulator) → classification_applied at 8 AM after indoor recovers → natural_ventilation at 6 PM
verdict.expected_behavior: Heat fires until indoor >= comfort_heat, then HVAC off; evening nat-vent when outdoor < indoor
